projects.title: Projects
projects.name: Name
projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete project "{name}"?
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create your first one!

keys.warning: Never expose the private key! Use it only on the server side.

frontend.title: JavaScript SDK Integration
frontend.autoDesc: The script will automatically find all forms on the page and protect them. Forms added dynamically (AJAX, SPA) are also auto-detected.
frontend.autoStep: Add to <head> or before </body> of your website:
frontend.manualDesc: The script loads and collects behavioral data, but does not protect forms automatically. You choose which forms to protect using CSS selectors.
frontend.manualStep: Include the script with auto=0 parameter:
frontend.manualExamples: Then protect the forms you need by selector:
frontend.byClass: By CSS class (all forms with this class):
frontend.bySelector: By any CSS selector or DOM element:
frontend.paramNote: URL parameter auto: auto=1 (default) — protect all forms automatically, auto=0 — manual protection only.
frontend.note: The SDK automatically adds a hidden _antispam_token field to each protected form before submission.

backend.title: Server-Side Verification
backend.description: After form submission, your server will receive the _antispam_token field. Send it to our API for verification:
backend.scoreNote: score — rating from 0.0 (bot) to 1.0 (human). Recommended threshold: 0.5

testing.title: Test Form
testing.description: Test the antispam integration for this project. Fill out the form and submit — the SDK will collect behavioral signals and generate a token, then the server will verify it.
testing.noToken: No _antispam_token found. SDK may not have loaded.

rules.title: Filter Rules
rules.name: Rule Name
rules.empty: No filter rules. Add rules to filter suspicious traffic.

fields.title: Custom Fields
fields.name: Field Name
fields.empty: No custom fields. Add fields to enable log filtering by custom parameters.
